The Ukraine pilgrimage was a pilgrimage by [[Kamidere]] to [[Ukraine]] to see the [[Blue Ancestor]]. It was part of the [[Alpha Pilgrimage]]


{{Alpha Pilgrimage}}

[[Category:Pilgrimages]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
